title: Add require_approval switch to scorecard_from_question_export procedure

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting implementation: add require_approval param to scorecard_from_question_export so dry_run/real runs can bypass HITL while runtime wait-state issue is being fixed.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented require_approval parameter (default true). Procedure now bypasses Human.approve when require_approval=false, enabling end-to-end execution while runtime HITL wait-state bug remains open. Validated YAML parse + yaml loader test.
